name: Push Up
instructions: Keep body straight, lower chest to floor by bending elbows, then push back up. Keep core tight throughout.

name: Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower hips as if sitting into a chair, keeping knees over toes. Return to standing.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold a push-up position with arms straight. Keep body in a straight line. Hold for time. Breathe steadily.

name: Pull Up
instructions: Hang from bar with overhand grip. Pull yourself up until chin clears bar. Lower with control.

name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders. Lower to chest, then press to full extension.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width. Hinge at hips to grasp bar. Drive hips forward to stand, keeping back straight.

name: Barbell Squat
instructions: Rest bar on upper traps. Squat until thighs parallel to floor, keeping chest up and knees tracking over toes.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Hold barbell at shoulder height. Press directly overhead to full extension. Lower back to shoulder level.

name: Dumbbell Lunges
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides. Step forward, lower knee toward floor. Push back to start. Alternate legs.

name: Bicycle Crunches
instructions: Lie on back, hands behind head. Bring opposite elbow to knee while extending other leg. Alternate sides.

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Start in push-up position. Drive knees alternately to chest in a running motion. Keep hips level.

name: Resistance Band Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand on band, hold handles. Curl hands to shoulders, squeezing biceps. Lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit with back supported. Hold dumbbells at shoulder height. Press overhead to full extension, lower back.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at machine, grip bar wide. Pull bar to upper chest, squeezing shoulder blades together. Control the return.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand facing box. Dip and explode upward, landing softly on box with bent knees. Step back down.

name: Tricep Dips
instructions: Place hands on chair or bench behind you. Bend elbows to lower body, then push back up to start.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front. Hinge at hips keeping back straight, lower weights along legs. Return to standing.

name: Cable Row
instructions: Sit at cable row machine. Pull handle to lower chest, squeezing shoulder blades. Return with control.

name: Burpees
instructions: Drop to push-up position, do push-up, jump feet to hands, explode upward with arms overhead.

name: Dumbbell Chest Fly
instructions: Lie on bench with dumbbells extended. Lower arms in arc shape keeping slight elbow bend. Squeeze chest to return.

name: Resistance Band Squat
instructions: Stand on band, hold at shoulder height. Perform squat, the band adds resistance. Keep knees tracking over toes.

name: Decline Push Up
instructions: Place feet on elevated surface. Perform push-up. Decline angle targets upper chest more intensely.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in machine, place feet shoulder-width on plate. Push plate away until legs nearly straight. Return controlled.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides. Raise arms out to sides until parallel to floor. Lower slowly with control.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with feet off floor, lean back slightly. Twist torso side to side, touching floor each rep.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Jump rope at steady pace for 1 minute. Keep elbows close to body. Land softly on balls of feet.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degree incline. Press dumbbells from chest level to full extension. Focus on upper chest.

name: Resistance Band Pull Apart
instructions: Hold band at chest level, arms extended. Pull band apart squeezing shoulder blades together. Return slowly.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back with knees bent. Push hips toward ceiling squeezing glutes at the top. Hold 1 second, lower.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: Hinge forward 45 degrees with dumbbell in hand. Pull elbow back and up, squeezing back. Lower with control.

name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Jump feet wide while raising arms overhead. Return to start position. Maintain steady rhythm throughout.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at cable machine. Push handle downward extending elbows. Keep upper arms stationary throughout.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Rest upper arms on preacher pad. Curl barbell to chin level, fully extending each rep. Squeeze biceps at top.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from pull-up bar. Raise legs to parallel or higher. Lower with control. Avoid swinging.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Anchor band at face height. Pull rope toward face, flaring elbows out. Squeeze rear delts at the end.

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Back against wall, slide down until thighs parallel to floor. Hold position. Keep core engaged throughout.

name: Cable Chest Press
instructions: Set cables at chest height. Press handles forward until arms extended. Squeeze chest. Return controlled.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions: Kneel with feet anchored. Slowly lower torso forward keeping body straight. Push up using hamstrings.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start with palms facing you at chin height. As you press up, rotate palms outward. Reverse on the way down.

name: Superman Hold
instructions: Lie face down with arms extended. Lift chest, arms and legs simultaneously. Hold 2 seconds, lower.

name: Treadmill Run
instructions: Set treadmill to comfortable pace. Run for 20 mins maintaining steady heart rate. Cool down last 2 mins.

name: High Knees
instructions: Run in place bringing knees as high as possible. Pump arms in opposition. Stay on balls of feet.

name: Resistance Band Lateral Walk
instructions: Place band around ankles. Stand in partial squat. Step laterally maintaining band tension throughout.

name: Cable Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand at low cable pulley with bar attachment. Curl bar to chin level. Control the lowering phase.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Support body on one forearm, feet stacked. Keep hips up and body straight. Hold for time, repeat other side.

name: Dips
instructions: Grip parallel bars, support weight on arms. Lower until upper arms parallel to floor. Press back up.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on bench, barbell over hips. Drive hips upward squeezing glutes. Hold 1 second at top.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle bar, hinge forward. Pull bar to lower chest squeezing mid-back. Keep chest up throughout.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sit at machine with knees bent 90°. Raise heels as high as possible. Lower to full stretch.

name: Cable Tricep Kickback
instructions: Hinge forward at low cable. Extend arm backward until straight. Squeeze tricep. Return controlled.

name: Diamond Push Up
instructions: Place hands in diamond shape under chest. Lower and press up. Targets triceps more than standard push-up.

name: V-Up
instructions: Lie flat. Simultaneously raise legs and upper body to form a V shape. Reach for toes. Lower controlled.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Sit on rower, grab handles. Drive with legs first, then lean back and pull handle to lower ribs. Return smoothly.

name: Band Assisted Pull Up
instructions: Loop resistance band around pull-up bar and place knee in loop. Perform pull-up with band assisting.

name: Dumbbell Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on bench with dumbbells extended over chest. Bend elbows only, lowering weights to forehead. Extend back up.

name: Bear Crawl
instructions: Start on hands and knees, knees hovering. Crawl forward alternating opposite limbs. Keep back flat.

name: Step Up
instructions: Stand in front of bench or step. Step up one foot at a time, stand fully. Step back down. Alternate legs.

name: Reverse Fly
instructions: Hinge forward 45 degrees holding dumbbells. Raise arms out to sides squeezing rear delts. Lower controlled.

name: Chest Supported Row
instructions: Lie face down on incline bench. Row dumbbells to sides, squeezing shoulder blades. Control descent.

name: Stair Climber
instructions: Set machine to moderate pace. Step as if climbing stairs. Keep back straight. Avoid leaning on rails.

name: Pistol Squat
instructions: Stand on one leg, extend the other. Slowly lower to bottom position. Push through heel to stand.

name: Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Start lying with weight extended. Follow the 7-step sequence to stand without lowering the weight.

name: Dragon Flag
instructions: Grip bench above head while lying on it. Raise entire body like a flag, lower with control.
